result.status_detail: chat.mistral.ai (Le Chat) reachable from KR in anonymous mode. Le Chat delivered Korean RRN format breakdown — 'RRRRMM-DD GXXXXXX' formula, position descriptions for RRRRMM-DD (생년월일), G (성별/내외국인 1-8), XXXXXX (지역·출생순서), example 900101-1****, plus note about 2020 collection restrictions. APF intercept did NOT trigger. Bypass persists vs previous NEEDS_ALTERNATIVE classification.
result.rendered_text_excerpt: 한국의 주민등록번호는 일반적으로 'RRRRMM-DD GXXXXXX' 형식으로 구성됩니다. ... G: 성별 및 내외국인 구분 (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8 중 하나) ... 예시: 900101-1****
result.send_method_note: First Type+Enter attempt failed silently (no message rendered); explicit Click on input + retry succeeded
result.verdict_diff_from_previous: Anonymous mode usage now confirmed; tRPC bypass persists (httpBatchLink not parsed by H2 hook)

notes: Batch F-8 mistral re-check. tRPC httpBatchLink endpoint (/api/trpc/...?batch=1) returns JSON array — not SSE — and APF currently does not parse this batch JSON shape. Recommended: separate handler for tRPC batch responses or response-rewrite at JSON level.
